title: SICILIAN
author: Roozbeh Dehghannasiri
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: SICILIAN is a statistical method for identifying RNA splice junctions using alignments reported from a spliced aligner. SICILIAN is currently implemented for the STAR aligner.
steps_raw: SICILIAN is a statistical method for identifying RNA splice junctions using alignments reported from a spliced aligner. SICILIAN is currently implemented for the STAR aligner.
